---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
Clear description of the feature you would like.

## Use Case
What problem does this solve? How would you use it?

## Module / Component
- **Applies to:** (ALP SDK / E1M Hardware / Documentation / Tooling)
- **Module:** (E1M-AEN / E1M-X V2N / E1M-X V2N-M1 / Industrial Camera / All)

## Priority
How important is this for your project? (Nice to have / Important / Critical)

## Additional Context
References, examples from other SDKs, or mockups.
